note: Verified same-send pair whose Amplemarket copy ADDED 'Re: ' — reply-prefix strip + body+recipient+time must still merge them.

rows.subject: Real-time video effects
rows.body_preview: Hi Matt, For video effects, the painful part usually shows up after you start shipping multiple builds (LoRA finetunes, quantisation passes, device-specific runtimes): QA becomes a moving target because “good” depends on the clip, the motion, and the hardware. Some teams use Encord to keep a fixed,
